fields.subject: Organization Update - PENRO WSTIS
fields.body_text:
Good day, Joseph Flores!

Your organizational assignment has been updated in the PENRO WSTIS system.

New Organizational Assignment:
Managerial Service Division → Conservation and Development Section

This change was made by: Cielo Lindo Perez

You can view your updated profile in the system.

If you have any questions about this change, please contact your administrator.

Access the system at: https://wise-penro.onrender.com

Best regards,
PENRO WSTIS Team
